solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def divisorGame(self, n: int) -> bool:
        return n % 2 == 0
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The game can be solved by observing a pattern: if n is even, Alice can always win by choosing 1 on her turn, making n odd for Bob. Bob will then be forced to make n even again, and Alice can repeat the process until Bob has no moves. If n is odd, Alice will eventually lose under optimal play. This solution leverages this pattern for efficiency.
